candidate_definition_hints.text: Automatically detect when operation was done incorrectly using power of computer vision

Operation Control is one of the Official [5sControl](https://5sControl.com/) algorithm. Plug it in our video monitoring system with AI analysis and ERP Integration (Open Source) to ensure the quality of your products.
